global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with bold text and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting food delivery with a focus on nearby favorites.

elements.label: orange background
elements.description: A vibrant orange background fills the entire canvas, providing a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Hungry? We got you
elements.description: Bold white text that stands out prominently in the center, conveying a sense of urgency and appeal.

elements.label: three food items
elements.description: An outline of three rectangular shapes representing food items, placed centrally with a minimalistic design.

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline, providing additional context about the offerings.

elements.label: CraveLoop logo
elements.description: A simple logo design featuring the text 'CraveLoop' in a modern font, positioned at the top left.

elements.label: UGC badge
elements.description: A small circular badge labeled 'UGC' in white, indicating user-generated content, located at the top left.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with rounded edges, featuring the text 'Claim reward' in bold white.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, positioned at the top right.
elements.text_content: Hungry? We got you Fresh favorites nearby

elements.label: three lines
elements.description: Three thin lines arranged vertically, adding a decorative touch to the overall design.
